scope: Additional technical terms encountered in translation installment 06 (Surat al-An'am and Surat al-A'raf).

terms.english: its counting applies / does not apply
terms.note: A recurring formula meaning that a given phrase is, or is not, recognized as a counted verse ending in a particular counting tradition.

terms.english: its third occurrence / the third of the occurrences
terms.note: A positional qualifier used when the same word or phrase appears multiple times in a surah and only one occurrence is under discussion.
